creator: melifaro@FreeBSD.org
text:
New version of ipfw in HEAD/11 has this issue solved.

10:57 [3] m@devel0 s ipfw table ports create type number algo number:array
10:57 [3] m@devel0 s ipfw table ports add 22
added: 22 0
10:58 [3] m@devel0 s ipfw add 1 count tcp from me to any lookup dst-port ports
00001 count tcp from me to lookup dst-port ports
10:58 [3] m@devel0 s ipfw show 1
00001     0       0 count tcp from me to lookup dst-port ports
10:58 [3] m@devel0 telnet 1.2.3.4 22
Trying 1.2.3.4...
^C
10:58 [3] m@devel0 s ipfw show 1
00001     1      60 count tcp from me to lookup dst-port ports
